## Completion Checklist

- [ ] The linked issue has exactly one GitHub milestone.
- [ ] The linked issue is on the `ePC-SAFT Roadmap` Project when it is active milestone work.
- [ ] Milestone plans, capability evidence, and user-facing docs are updated when behavior or claims change.
- [ ] Labels describe stable routing facts; Project fields describe workflow/readiness state.
- [ ] This PR does not broaden `capabilities()` or public claims without executable proof.
- [ ] The repo cleanup hook was run before handoff.

## Required PR Answers

- What downstream workflow can now run that could not run before?
- What production native code path now exists?
- What derivative path is used?
- What real data or benchmark proves it?
- What public API exercises it?
- What tests would fail if this regressed?
